title: GC pack
body:
A modpack for a private smp, made it public just so people on the server can download it through the modrinth app itself for easy updating

older versions of this modpack include vanillatweaks resourcepack, which you can find here: https://vanillatweaks.net/
if you don't like some of my chosen features (which are chosen to keep my server with the same look), you can go there and pick your own resource pack!

Another thing that i'm required to do is give you the link to amplified nether mod as this modpack uses it: https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether
